directive.title: Static RFQ dashboard with mock data structure

auditor.summary: The generated code is severely incomplete. Only 5 of 14 required files were created, and 3 of those 5 have a critical buildability issue (missing dependency on src/lib/utils.ts). The core TypeScript types and mock data are well-structured and pass acceptance criteria #2, but the lack of page components, navigation, dashboard metrics, RFQ table, and RFQ detail components means 8 of 10 acceptance criteria fail. The build cannot compile due to missing utility imports. This is a FAIL verdict requiring significant additional work before the directive can be considered complete.

top_issues.description: Imports from '../../lib/utils' but this file does not exist in the generated code. The cn utility function is missing, causing TypeScript compilation to fail.
